name: Scam Alerts flow
description: Test the Scam Alerts feature: user opens the scam alerts modal, enters a country, and receives common scam warnings

planSteps.description: Click the amber 'تحذيرات النصب' (Scam Alerts) button
Verify a modal opens with a country input field
Wait for the loading state to finish and verify a list of scam warnings is displayed, each with a title, description, and avoidance tip
Verify a general advice section is displayed at the end
Click submit with an empty country field
Verify a validation error message appears
